metadata.description: Name of VSP One SDS Block cluster. The value must be a valid value for the regular expression [a-zA-Z1-9-] and must be between 1 and 30 characters long.
A boolean value is used to define the configuration. Set it to "false" for a Single-AZ configuration and "true" for a Multi-AZ configuration.
List of zone numbers. Specify a comma-separated list of zone numbers: one for Single-AZ configuration or three for Multi-AZ configuration. Example: ["1"] or ["1","2","3"]
Time zone.
User data protection method.
Storage account name for saving the output data. The value must be a valid value for the regular expression [a-z1-9] and must be between 3 and 24 characters long.
Virtual network resource group name.
Virtual network name.
Subnet name for control network.
Subnet name for internode network.
Subnet name for compute subnet.
Enable IPv6 addresses on the compute network: Set to true to enable, or false to disable.
The network protocol for the compute network port.
MTU size for control network.
MTU size for inter-node network.
MTU size for compute network.
IPv4 addresses that allow access from outside the control subnet to the control network. Example ["10.0.2.1/24","10.0.3.5/24"]
IPv4 addresses that allow access from outside the compute subnet to the compute network. Example ["10.0.2.1/24","10.0.3.5/24"]
IPv6 addresses that allow access from outside the compute subnet to the compute network.
VM size for storage node VMs.
The number of storage nodes in a cluster.
The number of drives per storage node.
The capacity per user data drive (managed disk) [GiB].
The IOPS for user data drive. (3000-80000)
The throughput for user data drive [MiB/s]. (125-1200)
ID of disk encryption set when encrypting with customer-managed key.
Cost allocation tag.
An array of control IPv4 addresses to be assigned to each storage nodes.
An array of internode IPv4 addresses to be assigned to each storage nodes.
An array of compute IPv4 addresses to be assigned to each storage nodes.
An array of compute IPv6 addresses to be assigned to each storage nodes.
IPv4 address to be assigned to the load balancer.
Protection domain name.
Storage Pool name.
Usage of internal processing I/O resources.
List of VM image configurations.
